[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000000001 1
1 000100000 1
2 000000000 a
3 010000000 1
4 000011000 2
5 000000000 a
6 001111101 6
7 011111101 7
